stemHtml: On approach to land the flight crew is informed of a microburst near the runway. What should they do?

options.a: Hold until the bad weather has dissipated or diverted to alternate.
options.b: Land with a higher speed than normal and a low rate of descent.
options.c: Land with a lower speed than normal and a high rate of descent.
options.d: Land with a higher speed than normal.
